title: Chocolate Font ( Smooth & Modern)
description: Chocolate Font (Smooth) replaces Minecraft’s default pixel font with a clean, smooth, and modern typeface. It improves readability across menus, chat, and UI while keeping a vanilla-friendly look.
body:
🍫 Chocolate Font (Smooth)

Chocolate Font (Smooth) is a clean, modern font resource pack for Minecraft Java Edition that replaces the default pixel font with a smooth, stylish, and highly readable typeface—without breaking the vanilla UI feel.

Perfect for players who want a fresh look, content creators, and anyone tired of jagged or overly blocky fonts.

✨ Features
- Smooth, anti-aliased font (less pixelated)
- Clean and minimal design
- Easy on the eyes for long play sessions
- Works seamlessly with Minecraft’s UI
- Ideal for menus, chat, and HUD text
- Lightweight and performance-friendly

![Main Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ee3c1409b4246fcf7a25ace9fe9edf96adeb67e.jpeg)
![Settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b5c2ba65453231930f0fc01b080119ac0dbe67b.jpeg)
![Video section](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11e470bf32a9a10a3dbdc508aee7502296c0814f.jpeg)

🎮 Compatibility
- Minecraft Java Edition
- Tested on 1.21.x
- Works with:
  - Vanilla
  - Resource packs
  - PojavLauncher (Android)

⚠️ Some launchers may show a “made for older version” warning — this is a Minecraft UI bug and does not affect functionality.

📦 Installation
1. Download the resource pack
2. Place it in your `resourcepacks` folder
3. Enable it in Options → Resource Packs
4. Enjoy smooth text ✨

🖥 Recommended Settings
- GUI Scale: 2–3 (best clarity)
- Fullscreen: Optional
- VSync: Off (for sharper text)
